title: Redesign ProjectCard.jsx & WriteupCard — zero radius, solid borders, mono metadata, red accent tags
acceptance_criteria: All inline borderRadius references set to 0 (iconWrapStyle, iconInnerStyle)
IconBezel: remove double-bezel nesting, render as flat icon container with solid 1px border
IconBezel inner span: remove nested border-radius and border-accent color
Card integration works with redesigned Card component (variant='interactive')
First tag in tag list: red accent border+text (not cyan)
All tags: no border-radius, mono font-family
Star count styling: mono font, muted text, no glow
Button inside ProjectCard (View on GitHub): uses redesigned Button secondary variant
WriteupCard: same zero-radius, solid border, mono metadata treatment
WriteupCard link: no accent-dim bg on ButtonIcon, static positioning
ArrowUpRight icon: remove transition animation (no group-hover translate)
Remove backdrop-blur from any nested elements
Remove shadow tokens from all inline styles
